Interface IColorSchemeGroup

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a color scheme group.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("853BA5F4-8091-401B-A767-83C1A0C46C6F")]
public interface IColorSchemeGroup

Properties

Capacity

Returns the capacity of levels.

ILongArray Capacity { get; }

Property Value

ILongArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

ColorCodeIDs

Returns the color code IDs of the color scheme group.

ILongArray ColorCodeIDs { get; }

Property Value

ILongArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

Delimiter

Returns the delimiter.

string Delimiter { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Level

Returns the level of the color scheme group.

int Level { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

Returns the name.

string Name { get; }

string
